selections.name: Moonlit Sonata
selections.reason: Top speed figures in the field (118) and drops into a softer SOC spot. Form cycle indicates a peak effort.

selections.name: Kokosan
selections.reason: Consistent presser with a 115 speed rating. Fresu in the irons adds confidence for a stalking trip.

selections.name: Rostovsky
selections.reason: Solid class rating of 107 and fits well in this pace scenario. Should be closing late.

selections.name: Sneaking Candy
selections.reason: Early speed threat who could get brave if left alone on the lead, though turf penalizes pure 'E' types slightly.

danger_horse.name: Sand Bagger
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and Tyler Baze could work out a ground-saving trip at a price.

selections.name: Sendit Mo
selections.reason: Standout on class and speed (107). Fresu rides for Papaprodromou. The clear horse to beat.

selections.name: Rollinwithpolan
selections.reason: Speed rating of 105 makes him the logical alternative if the favorite falters.

selections.name: Straight Buzzin
selections.reason: Hernandez takes the mount; possesses enough tactical speed to secure a good position.

selections.name: Desert Kat
selections.reason: Outside draw is favorable, but needs to improve on a 95 speed rating to challenge the top pair.

selections.name: Dreaming On
selections.reason: Strong 112 speed rating and 107 class. Kimura rides for Yakteen. Looks primed for a breakthrough.

selections.name: Woodson
selections.reason: Jaramillo aboard for Eurton. 106 speed rating puts him right in the mix.

selections.name: Pacer
selections.reason: First-time starter for Sadler with Fresu riding. Outside post is a plus for a debut runner.

selections.name: Kore Kinetic
selections.reason: First start since being gelded. Could show improvement at a price.

danger_horse.name: Rags Over Riches
danger_horse.reason: Baltas trainee with Ayuso riding; dangerous connections.

selections.name: Gallatin
selections.reason: Speed rating of 112 and class of 101. Peter Miller trainee with Kimura up is a strong combination.

selections.name: Savage Warden
selections.reason: D'Amato trainee with Fresu. 111 speed rating shows he belongs with these.

selections.name: Fumano's Magic
selections.reason: Rail draw and Tyler Baze. 107 speed rating makes him a contender for the exotics.

selections.name: Prime Artist (fr)
selections.reason: European import with Ayuso riding. Class rating of 100 suggests upside.

danger_horse.name: Map Me Sexy
danger_horse.reason: O'Neill trainee with Jaramillo. Outside post but has tactical speed.

selections.name: Red Flag
selections.reason: Classy veteran with a 113 speed rating and 108 class. Drops into a very winnable spot.

selections.name: Shady Tiger
selections.reason: D'Amato trainee drawn perfectly outside. 113 speed rating matches the top pick.

selections.name: Whiskyginandbrandy
selections.reason: Fresu rides for Knapp. 104 speed rating and consistent form make him a major player.

selections.name: Mega Moon
selections.reason: Hernandez up for Ellis. 113 speed rating shows high ceiling if he fires his best shot.

selections.name: On The Whim
selections.reason: Massive 128 speed rating and 111 class. Looks like a standout on paper.

selections.name: Lonesome Stew
selections.reason: Fresu rides for Glatt. 114 speed rating and 106 class. The main danger to the top pick.

selections.name: Sir Rocket
selections.reason: Mike Smith rides this veteran with a 121 speed rating. Dangerous if he gets loose.

selections.name: Bro Bro
selections.reason: Geroux rides for O'Neill. 115 speed rating puts him in the exotic mix.

danger_horse.name: Re Armed Jon
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and 120 speed rating. Could sneak into the trifecta at a price.

selections.name: Lil's Coffee
selections.reason: O'Neill trainee with Jaramillo. Class rating of 101 is superior in this weak field.

selections.name: Exington
selections.reason: Fresu rides for Miyadi. 107 speed rating shows she can run with these.

selections.name: A Fleet Ride
selections.reason: Rail draw and Ayuso. 100 speed rating makes her a logical contender.

selections.name: Makenarita
selections.reason: Kimura rides. 102 speed rating gives her a chance to hit the board.

danger_horse.name: Can'tdealwithit
danger_horse.reason: Drops in class and could wake up in this spot.

selections.name: Uncle Chilly
selections.reason: Ayuso rides for Mullins. 116 speed rating and 105 class makes him the one to beat.

selections.name: Mici's Express
selections.reason: Jaramillo rides for O'Neill. 107 speed rating and consistent form.

selections.name: Majestic Palisades
selections.reason: Hernandez rides. 105 speed rating and should get a good stalking trip.

selections.name: Crypto Ride
selections.reason: Frey rides. 108 speed rating gives him an outside chance at a price.

selections.name: Grand Slam Smile
selections.reason: Standout class (118) and speed (125). Outside draw shouldn't be an issue for this talented filly.

selections.name: May Day Ready
selections.reason: Fresu rides for Mandella. 115 speed rating and 116 class makes her the primary threat.

selections.name: Tirupati
selections.reason: Kimura rides for Thomas. 116 speed rating and drawn well inside.

selections.name: Watchtower
selections.reason: Baltas trainee with Orantes. 118 speed rating puts her in the exotic picture.

danger_horse.name: Take A Breath (gb)
danger_horse.reason: Jaramillo rides for Glatt. 110 speed rating and dangerous connections.
